creator: sirmoo@cowbert.2y.net
text:
The wmWeather port, maintained by Kris Kennaway, which can be found under ports-misc, needs to change its makefile to check for wget(1), since wmWeather requires it.

Fix: 

make wmWeather, read the wmWeather documentation, and install wget(1) from ports-net before running wmWeather.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
